cargo_toml:
[package]
name = "mv_impl"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[[bin]]
name = "util"
path = "src/main.rs"

[dependencies]
libc = "0.2"
deps_rationale: The implementation uses only the Rust standard library plus libc for Linux renameat2(RENAME_EXCHANGE), which is needed for the documented --exchange option. It covers common GNU mv flags including overwrite policy, target-directory forms, verbose/debug, backups, update modes, and cross-device copy fallback, while intentionally skipping SELinux contexts, ACL/xattr preservation, sparse/reflink behavior, and full metadata fidelity.
